title: Westland Boost All Purpose Liquid Plant Food 1 L
features: Rich in seaweed for healthy growth
Easier & faster to water with minimal surface run odd & no waste
All nutrients available for the plant
Nutrients optimised for all plants, composts & soil types
description: From the manufacturer Boost All Purpose Liquid Plant Feed Westland Boost All Purpose Liquid Plant Feed helps gardeners achieve stunning floral displays and an abundance of healthy fruit and veg. Boost has unique Plantsense technology to feed all bedding, ericaceous plants, and fruit and vegetables. It is also the first feed suitable for both peat and peat free composts. Boost All Purpose Liquid Plant Feed will produce four times more blooms compared to watering alone. In addition, more fruit and veg is guaranteed. *Bedding plants vs. unfed Key Benefits 4 x more blooms* & more fruits & vegetables guaranteed Maximised water absorption Optimised ratio of high quality nutrients for 4 x more flowers Plantsense technology for superior application of nutrients Suitable for all peat & peat free composts, all ornamental & ericaceous plants & all fruit & veg Boost All Purpose Liquid Plant Feed 4x More Blooms* Transform your garden with Westland Boost All Purpose Liquid Plant Feed , specially designed to deliver 4 times more blooms than watering alone with its optimised ratio of high quality nutrients for 4 x more flowers. Boost not only ensures vibrant floral displays and guaranteed more fruit and vegetables. How to use Shake well before use Fill the inner part of the cap until the line (10ml) Pour into your watering can and mix with 4.5L/1 gal of water For ease, feed every time you water when plants are actively growing (Mar – Sept) Alternatively, mix 20ml (2 x 10ml doses) in 4.5l of water and feed weekly. For small or sensitive plants use 10ml in 4.5l of water and feed weekly. To avoid plant damage do not apply directly to foliage, or in freezing conditions. Do not overdose. Where to use Westland Boost All Purpose Liquid Plant Feed can be used on hanging baskets and containers, beds and borders, ericaceous, small plug, established and sensitive plants, as well as fruit and vegetable patches. PlantSense Technology - How it Works Westland Boost All Purpose Liquid Plant Feed contains a wetting agent which helps the feed get into the soil evenly. It minimises surface run off, making it easier and faster to water. Nutrients are gradually released to ensure plant growth is continual and this ensures strong healthy growth and a longer flowering season.

product_details_tab_data.Specific Uses: All-purpose plant food for promoting flowering and fruiting in various plants, both indoors and outdoors, with recommended use during the active growth period.
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: To avoid plant damage, do not apply directly to foliage or in freezing conditions. Do not overdose. Always read the product label before use. For full safety information, please see the product Safety Data Sheet (SDS). Do not exceed the appropriate application rate, as increasing the dosage may result in damage to your plants. Wash hands and exposed skin after use.
